nodes.label: Screenshot Modes
nodes.description: 5 configurable modes: full, element_crop, element_context (default, 80px padding), full_highlighted, both. Selectable per workspace from the web app.

nodes.label: Issue Buffer
nodes.description: Local buffer of captured issues stored in chrome.storage. Side panel shows list with severity badges. Submit All POSTs all buffered issues to backend; Clear wipes them.

nodes.label: Connectors Hub
nodes.description: Web platform page with step-by-step setup guides for Azure DevOps, Jira, Trello, and Monday integrations.

nodes.label: React Component Detection
nodes.description: Reads __reactFiber$ to extract component name, tree, and props from the clicked element for richer bug context.

nodes.label: Keyboard Shortcut (⌥⇧Q)
nodes.description: Alt+Shift+Q toggles recording from any page. Handled in background.js.
